title: ampelodesmos tenax var. bicolor
intro: Ampelodesmos tenax var. bicolor, also known as the golden beard grass, is a plant species that belongs to the Poaceae family and is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Ampelodesmos tenax var. bicolor include its ability to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, and it is also used topically as a poultice or cream.
